channel.title: How to add a Wordpress page link in frontity menu .. for example in I want to run blogs page from website?
channel.description: I want to link one page from WordPress for example www.wordpress_site.com/Blogs .. this page will render from WordPress and not react.js. If I have a Home , about Us , Blogs and Contact us ... all other pages are reacts pages but blogs will render from wordpress. Thanks

item.title: How to add a Wordpress page link in frontity menu .. for example in I want to run blogs page from website?
item.dc:creator: Just_developer
item.description:
I want to link one page from WordPress for example www.wordpress_site.com/Blogs … this page will render from WordPress and not react.js. If I have a Home , about Us , Blogs and Contact us … all other pages are reacts pages but blogs will render from wordpress. Thanks

Read full topic
item.source: How to add a Wordpress page link in frontity menu .. for example in I want to run blogs page from website?
